description: cs_assure verify gate: the repo's LOCAL workspace gate as no-shell argv steps, run from the declared cwd. cs_assure runs these itself and seals a WorkspaceVerification record binding the real exit codes to the change set - so a green result is EVIDENCE the gate ran, not a narrated claim. This is the WORKSPACE gate (ruff + mypy + pytest); it is deliberately NOT the CI gate (CI additionally enforces --cov=corpus_studio --cov-fail-under=88 and the web/contract job). A green workspace gate is not commit / PR / release / sealed-research readiness.
